statement: AMD signed a definitive agreement with Rackspace for a phased 30 MW deployment of AMD Instinct GPUs (MI355X, MI350P) and EPYC CPUs across Rackspace data centers from late 2026 through 2028.
why: A fresh definitive design win for Instinct GPUs at an enterprise AI cloud provider adds durable demand, though no dollar value is disclosed and deployments remain conditional.

impact.mechanism: Design win commits Rackspace capacity to AMD Instinct GPUs and EPYC CPUs for regulated enterprise AI workloads.

evidence.excerpt: This collaboration incorporates both AMD Instinct GPUs (including MI355X, MI350P, and future successor solutions) and AMD EPYC CPUs

confidence.basis: Primary SEC filing, but no dollar value disclosed and deployments/financing are subject to further agreement with no-assurance caveats.
